COURT ADJOURNS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, CHAU SINH VAYLIN, KATHY $11,004.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,004.00, $2,751 PRINCIPAL; $8,253 EXEMPLARY TO A TOTAL OF $11,004.00 AGAINST DEFENDANTS CHAU SINH LAM AND KATHY VAY LIN COSTS OF SUIT. JUDGMENT FOR DEFT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AGAINST PLTF. SHAIKH AHMED. DEFT CSAA SHALL RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
